column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Scandinavian historical data
Dataset Author: Natalia Koroleva; Danilova A.D., Kalliola R., Nordhagen R., and O. Gjaerevoll.

Dataset Reference: Nordhagen R. 1928 (1927). Die Vegetation und Flora des Sylenegebietes. I. Die Vegetation. Skrifter utgitt av Det Norske Videnskaps-Akademi i Oslo. I. MatematiskNaturvidenskapelig Klasse 1: 311; O. Gjaerevoll. 1950. The snow-bed vegetation in the surroundings of Lake Torneträsk, Swedish Lappland // Svensk Botanisk Tidskrift. Bd. 44. Hf. 2. S.426–427. Tab. XV
Dataset Table: Modified Species Cover Data for Scandinavia

Dataset Notes: Braun Blanquet species cover scale is used. Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
